ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-11-2018 Advanced From Feb-05-19 To Dec-04-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lillian Ng for Trustee.

The Court stated that the issue really goes to payment to the Trustee taken without a Court order and various expenses for which the Trustee is asking for reimbursement for such things as the Husband's transportation (airfare) for the Husband to accompany her on a trip and the additional expense because the Husband had to leave early. Ms. Ng stated that they have addressed the issue in the supplement that was filed on December 5th, that the Family members all understand that her Client was taking care of her Aunt, that her Client thinks she is entitled to these expenses and that they are happy with what ever the Court decides. The First and Final Report and Account of Successor Trustee is under submission. Ms. Ng advised the Court that they are trying to get the taxes wrapped in 2018.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
